channel.title: cncf on Daniel-Andrei Minca
channel.description: Recent content in cncf on Daniel-Andrei Minca

item.title: IstioCon 21
item.description: ICYMI, IstioCon ‘21 was happening previous week 22-26 Feb 2021. Luckily the videos are still there, so if you want to check what’s been discussed you can still do it, it’s nice that you can login with  Apple ID also 😉 Talks I found interesting I want to sketch a mesh for you - by Christian Posta ✨ installing the Istio control plane with the revision flag istioctl install .
